title: MAXFILEUPLOADSIZE
text: MAXFILEUPLOADSIZE Specifies the maximum size, in kilobytes, of files that can be uploaded from the client to the server. Explain this code <init-param> <param-name>MAXFILEUPLOADSIZE</param-name> <param-value> KiloBytes </param-value> </init-param> Copy Default if omitted: 64 Description This can be used to protect the web server and the WRD against large uploads which would slow down the overall performance of a business-critical application. Related Links web.xml Configuration file of the web application. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
